narrative:
Pusheta Township has 932 registered voters, with 48.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.4 percentage points.
